headline: Alex Jimenez
body: Alex Jimenez set to join Fiorentina on a loan with a €20m option to buy, including bonuses. Also a 30% sell-on should the deal be made permanent. Jimenez is still part of an ongoing external investigation following posts that circulated on social media. No verdict reached yet.
raw_text:
Alex Jimenez set to join Fiorentina on a loan with a €20m option to buy, including bonuses. Also a 30% sell-on should the deal be made permanent.

Jimenez is still part of an ongoing external investigation following posts that circulated on social media. No verdict reached yet.
text:

Jimenez is still part of an ongoing external investigation following posts that circulated on social media. No verdict reached yet.
